scripts.build: npm run build -w @tinysa/contracts && npm run build -w @tinysa/analysis && npm run build -w @tinysa/agent && npm run build -w @tinysa/device && npm run build -w @tinysa/test-device && npm run build -w @tinysa/desktop
scripts.release:trio: npm run check:trio-contract && npm run check && npm --prefix ../TinySA_SignalLab run check && npm run check:firmware-twin
scripts.check: npm run check:launcher && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test
